bead.title: Add agent mode-matrix harness for lifecycle, execution, and XDG sharing
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The current coverage in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go:65-77 and cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_isolated_worktree_test.go:112-256 proves individual execution behaviors, but it does not exercise the same scenario set through both Convention and InTree fixtures. The cross-mode invariant from ddx-602ae31a stays untested.

ROOT CAUSE
The existing tests are per-feature and only assert one mode or one worktree shape at a time; no shared matrix harness drives both ddxroot.Path() layouts through the same scenarios.

PROPOSED FIX
Add cli/internal/agent/test_mode_matrix_test.go (or a comparable test package) with package doc stating the cross-mode invariant. Parameterize Convention and InTree fixtures, then cover:
- TestModeMatrix_BeadLifecycle
- TestModeMatrix_BeadExecution
- TestModeMatrix_TwoClonesShareXDG
- TestModeMatrix_OperatorExpectationDocumented
Use deterministic project roots, isolated XDG tempdirs, and a shared helper that makes the only allowed difference the on-disk anchor.

NON-SCOPE
Plugin/persona/meta-prompt/auto-commit/docs scenarios.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/agent/test_mode_matrix_test.go exists with package doc and helpers for Convention/InTree fixtures.
2. TestModeMatrix_BeadLifecycle, TestModeMatrix_BeadExecution, TestModeMatrix_TwoClonesShareXDG, and TestModeMatrix_OperatorExpectationDocumented exist and pass for both modes.
3. The two-clone subscenario asserts the shared XDG project dir and worktrees.json master-pinning behavior.
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
